statement: The Essential Eight Maturity Model's most recent substantive revision is the 27 November 2023 update (phishing-resistant MFA, 48-hour critical patching, logging/cloud uplift); it remains the current maturity model at retrieval.

evidence.quote: The Essential Eight Maturity Model was last updated on 27 November 2023

falsifier: A cyber.gov.au E8MM 'last updated' date after Nov 2023 would falsify this.
